sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103257" key="tessareskaidekasu/llabos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεσσᾰρεσκαιδεκα-σύλλᾰβος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n103257.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of fourteen syllables</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:7:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
